# Add Alter Columns
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename} DROP COLUMN NextScheduledReadDate;""")
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename} DROP COLUMN CDC_StartDate;""")
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename} DROP COLUMN CDC_EndDate;""")
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename} DROP COLUMN CDC_Ops;""")
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename} DROP COLUMN CDC_CurrentFlag;""")
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename} DROP COLUMN Nem12HashDiff;""")
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename} ADD COLUMN NextScheduledReadDate STRING;""")

# Add CreationDate Columns
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename_temp} DROP COLUMN NextScheduledReadDate;""")
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename_temp} DROP COLUMN CDC_StartDate;""")
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename_temp} DROP COLUMN CDC_EndDate;""")
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename_temp} DROP COLUMN CDC_Ops;""")
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename_temp} DROP COLUMN CDC_CurrentFlag;""")
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename_temp} DROP COLUMN Nem12HashDiff;""")
spark.sql(f"""ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename_temp} ADD COLUMN NextScheduledReadDate STRING;""")

#How to reorder columns in Delta table for better performance in Databricks PySpark
spark.sql(f'ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename} ALTER COLUMN Nem12HashKey FIRST;')
spark.sql(f'ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename} ALTER COLUMN CDC_LoadDate AFTER Nem12HashKey;')
spark.sql(f'ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename} ALTER COLUMN MSATSLoadDateTime AFTER CDC_LoadDate;')
spark.sql(f'ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename} ALTER COLUMN CreationDate AFTER MSATSLoadDateTime;')

#How to reorder columns in Delta table for better performance in Databricks PySpark
spark.sql(f'ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename_temp} ALTER COLUMN Nem12HashKey FIRST;')
spark.sql(f'ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename_temp} ALTER COLUMN CDC_LoadDate AFTER Nem12HashKey;')
spark.sql(f'ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename_temp} ALTER COLUMN MSATSLoadDateTime AFTER CDC_LoadDate;')
spark.sql(f'ALTER TABLE {databasename}.{tablename_temp} ALTER COLUMN CreationDate AFTER MSATSLoadDateTime;')
# Performance Tuning Apache Spark with Z-Ordering

#Get Parameter from controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_Silver"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
#source_file = '' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch
